2206810.name: The Last Dungeon
2206810.description:
Descend into the dungeon that has become the last for many adventurers.

The Last Dungeon is a tile based dungeon crawler in virtual reality.
Explore the dungeon to find a way out of it, otherwise it will be your last.

  • Use keys, levers, buttons, etc. to interact with the environment.
  • Fight various creatures that will hinder your progress.
  • Solve puzzles that will open up previously unexplored dungeon paths.
  • Find hidden secrets that can give you new power.
